# Vendored assets

Committed byte-exact; never served from a CDN (the UI is self-contained
by design). To upgrade: replace the file from the pinned upstream
release, update the hash and version here, and re-run the UI tests.

## htmx.min.js

- Version: 2.0.9
- Source: https://unpkg.com/htmx.org@2.0.9/dist/htmx.min.js
  (release https://github.com/bigskysoftware/htmx/releases/tag/v2.0.9)
- SHA-256: 57d9191515339922bd1356d7b2d80b1ee3b29f1b3a2c65a078bb8b2e8fd9ae5f
- Licence: 0BSD (HTMX-LICENSE.txt alongside)
